;;;359    static void ffs_init(void)

;;;360    {
000002  b08b              SUB      sp,sp,#0x2c
;;;361        if (vfs_nvm_is_available()!=0u)
000004  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_is_available
000008  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00000a  d079              BEQ      |L1.256|
;;;362        {
;;;363            uint32_t num_clusters;
;;;364            uint32_t total_sectors;
;;;365    
;;;366            // Initialize MBR
;;;367            memcpy(&mbr_ffs, &mbr_tmpl, sizeof(mbr_t));
00000c  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00000e  0252              LSLS     r2,r2,#9
000010  493c              LDR      r1,|L1.260|
000012  483d              LDR      r0,|L1.264|
000014  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;368            mbr_ffs.max_root_dir_entries = 128u;
000018  483b              LDR      r0,|L1.264|
00001a  2180              MOVS     r1,#0x80
00001c  7441              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x11]
00001e  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000020  7481              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x12]
;;;369    
;;;370            //total_sectors = ((disk_size + KB(64)) / mbr.bytes_per_sector);
;;;371            total_sectors = VFS_NVM_FILE_SIZE / mbr_ffs.bytes_per_sector;
000022  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000024  7b20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0xc]  ; mbr_ffs
000026  7ae2              LDRB     r2,[r4,#0xb]  ; mbr_ffs
000028  0201              LSLS     r1,r0,#8
00002a  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
00002c  4837              LDR      r0,|L1.268|
00002e  1ce4              ADDS     r4,r4,#3
000030  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
;;;372            // Make sure this is the right size for a FAT16 volume
;;;373            if (total_sectors < FAT_CLUSTERS_MIN * mbr_ffs.sectors_per_cluster) {
000034  1ee5              SUBS     r5,r4,#3
000036  7b69              LDRB     r1,[r5,#0xd]  ; mbr_ffs
000038  4a35              LDR      r2,|L1.272|
00003a  434a              MULS     r2,r1,r2
00003c  4282              CMP      r2,r0
00003e  d803              BHI      |L1.72|
;;;374                total_sectors = FAT_CLUSTERS_MIN * mbr_ffs.sectors_per_cluster;
;;;375            } else if (total_sectors > FAT_CLUSTERS_MAX * mbr_ffs.sectors_per_cluster) {
000040  4a34              LDR      r2,|L1.276|
000042  434a              MULS     r2,r1,r2
000044  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000046  d200              BCS      |L1.74|
                  |L1.72|
000048  4610              MOV      r0,r2
                  |L1.74|
;;;376                total_sectors = FAT_CLUSTERS_MAX * mbr_ffs.sectors_per_cluster;
;;;377            }
;;;378            if (total_sectors >= 0x10000) {
00004a  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
00004c  041b              LSLS     r3,r3,#16
00004e  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000050  4298              CMP      r0,r3
000052  d305              BCC      |L1.96|
;;;379                mbr_ffs.total_logical_sectors = 0;
000054  7422              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x10]
000056  0a12              LSRS     r2,r2,#8
000058  7462              STRB     r2,[r4,#0x11]
;;;380                mbr_ffs.big_sectors_on_drive  = total_sectors;
00005a  4a2b              LDR      r2,|L1.264|
00005c  6210              STR      r0,[r2,#0x20]  ; mbr_ffs
00005e  e004              B        |L1.106|
                  |L1.96|
;;;381            } else {
;;;382                mbr_ffs.total_logical_sectors = total_sectors;
000060  7420              STRB     r0,[r4,#0x10]
000062  0a03              LSRS     r3,r0,#8
000064  7463              STRB     r3,[r4,#0x11]
;;;383                mbr_ffs.big_sectors_on_drive  = 0;
000066  4b28              LDR      r3,|L1.264|
000068  621a              STR      r2,[r3,#0x20]  ; mbr_ffs
                  |L1.106|
;;;384            }
;;;385            // FAT table will likely be larger than needed, but this is allowed by the
;;;386            // fat specification
;;;387            num_clusters = total_sectors / mbr_ffs.sectors_per_cluster;
00006a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
;;;388            mbr_ffs.logical_sectors_per_fat = (num_clusters * 2 + VFS_SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
00006e  492a              LDR      r1,|L1.280|
000070  0200              LSLS     r0,r0,#8
000072  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1
000074  0c04              LSRS     r4,r0,#16
000076  82ec              STRH     r4,[r5,#0x16]
;;;389            // Initailize virtual media
;;;390    
;;;391            memset(&virtual_media_ffs, 0, sizeof(virtual_media_ffs));
000078  21c0              MOVS     r1,#0xc0
00007a  4828              LDR      r0,|L1.284|
00007c  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;392            memcpy(&virtual_media_ffs, &virtual_media_tmpl_ffs, sizeof(virtual_media_tmpl_ffs));
000080  223c              MOVS     r2,#0x3c
000082  4927              LDR      r1,|L1.288|
000084  4825              LDR      r0,|L1.284|
000086  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;393    
;;;394            virtual_media_ffs[MEDIA_IDX_FAT1].length = VFS_SECTOR_SIZE * mbr_ffs.logical_sectors_per_fat;
00008a  4924              LDR      r1,|L1.284|
00008c  0260              LSLS     r0,r4,#9
;;;395            virtual_media_ffs[MEDIA_IDX_FAT2].length = VFS_SECTOR_SIZE * mbr_ffs.logical_sectors_per_fat;
00008e  6148              STR      r0,[r1,#0x14]  ; virtual_media_ffs
;;;396    
;;;397            virtual_media_idx_ffs = 5u;
000090  6208              STR      r0,[r1,#0x20]  ; virtual_media_ffs
000092  4924              LDR      r1,|L1.292|
000094  2005              MOVS     r0,#5
;;;398    
;;;399            // Validate FAT table in the FLASH memory
;;;400            uint8_t cluster_zero[2];
;;;401    
;;;402            vfs_nvm_read_FAT(cluster_zero, 0u, 2u);
000096  60c8              STR      r0,[r1,#0xc]  ; virtual_media_idx_ffs
000098  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
00009a  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00009c  4668              MOV      r0,sp
00009e  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_FAT
;;;403    
;;;404            if ((cluster_zero[0] == 0xF8u) && (cluster_zero[1] == 0xFFu))
0000a2  4668              MOV      r0,sp
0000a4  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]
;;;405            {
;;;406                // FAT table already exists in the FLASH memory
;;;407    
;;;408                // Validate FLASH directory in the FLASH memory
;;;409                FatDirectoryEntry_t de;
;;;410    
;;;411                vfs_nvm_read_DIR((uint8_t*)(&de), 0u, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
;;;412    
;;;413                if (de.filename[0] == 0xFFu)
;;;414                {
;;;415                    // FLASH directory does not exist in the FLASH memory, initialize
;;;416                    vfs_nvm_setup_DIR();
;;;417    
;;;418                    memcpy(&de, &root_dir_entry, sizeof(root_dir_entry));
0000a6  4c20              LDR      r4,|L1.296|
0000a8  28f8              CMP      r0,#0xf8              ;404
0000aa  d103              BNE      |L1.180|
0000ac  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;404
0000ae  7840              LDRB     r0,[r0,#1]            ;404
0000b0  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff              ;404
0000b2  d002              BEQ      |L1.186|
                  |L1.180|
;;;419                    memcpy(&(de.filename), "FLASH      ", 11u);
;;;420                    vfs_nvm_write_DIR((uint8_t*)(&de), 0u, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
;;;421                }
;;;422                else
;;;423                {
;;;424                    // FLASH directory already exists in the FLASH memory, do nothing
;;;425                }
;;;426            }
;;;427            else
;;;428            {
;;;429                // FAT table does not exist in the FLASH memory
;;;430                // initialize start of FAT in the FLASH memory with FAT from the RAM
;;;431                // also initialize DIR region as it makes no sense to keep old and possibly invalid content
;;;432                FatDirectoryEntry_t de;
;;;433    
;;;434                vfs_nvm_setup_FAT();
0000b4  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_setup_FAT
;;;435                vfs_nvm_setup_DIR();
;;;436    
;;;437                memcpy(&de, &root_dir_entry, sizeof(root_dir_entry));
;;;438                memcpy(&(de.filename), "FLASH      ", 11u);
;;;439                vfs_nvm_write_DIR((uint8_t*)(&de), 0u, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
;;;440            }
0000b8  e008              B        |L1.204|
                  |L1.186|
0000ba  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20              ;411
0000bc  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;411
0000be  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8              ;411
0000c0  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_DIR
0000c4  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;413
0000c6  7a00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#8]            ;413
0000c8  28ff              CMP      r0,#0xff              ;413
0000ca  d119              BNE      |L1.256|
                  |L1.204|
0000cc  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_setup_DIR
0000d0  4816              LDR      r0,|L1.300|
0000d2  4601              MOV      r1,r0                 ;418
0000d4  316c              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x6c           ;418
0000d6  c92e              LDM      r1,{r1-r3,r5}         ;418
0000d8  9505              STR      r5,[sp,#0x14]         ;418
0000da  9304              STR      r3,[sp,#0x10]         ;418
0000dc  9203              STR      r2,[sp,#0xc]          ;418
0000de  9102              STR      r1,[sp,#8]            ;418
0000e0  6fc0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x7c]         ;418  ; root_dir_entry
0000e2  ad06              ADD      r5,sp,#0x18           ;418
0000e4  69e3              LDR      r3,[r4,#0x1c]         ;418  ; root_dir_entry
0000e6  69a2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x18]         ;418  ; root_dir_entry
0000e8  6961              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x14]         ;418  ; root_dir_entry
0000ea  c50f              STM      r5!,{r0-r3}           ;418
0000ec  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb               ;419
0000ee  a110              ADR      r1,|L1.304|
0000f0  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8              ;419
0000f2  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
0000f6  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20              ;420
0000f8  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;420
0000fa  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8              ;420
0000fc  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_write_DIR
                  |L1.256|
;;;441        }
;;;442    }
000100  b00b              ADD      sp,sp,#0x2c
000102  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;443    
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.ffs_read||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  ffs_read PROC
;;;589    
;;;590    void ffs_read(uint32_t requested_sector, uint8_t *buf, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b5f7              PUSH     {r0-r2,r4-r7,lr}
;;;591    {
000002  b082              SUB      sp,sp,#8
000004  4615              MOV      r5,r2
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;592        if (vfs_nvm_is_available()!=0u)
000008  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_is_available
00000c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00000e  d02a              BEQ      |L2.102|
;;;593        {
;;;594            uint8_t i = 0;
000010  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;595            uint32_t current_sector;
;;;596            // Zero out the buffer
;;;597            memset(buf, 0, num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE);
000012  0269              LSLS     r1,r5,#9
000014  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
000016  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
;;;598            current_sector = 0;
;;;599    
;;;600            for (i = 0; i < virtual_media_idx_ffs; i++) {
00001a  4914              LDR      r1,|L2.108|
00001c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;598
00001e  68ca              LDR      r2,[r1,#0xc]  ; virtual_media_idx_ffs
000020  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
000022  d920              BLS      |L2.102|
                  |L2.36|
;;;601                uint32_t vm_sectors = virtual_media_ffs[i].length / VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
000024  4631              MOV      r1,r6
000026  220c              MOVS     r2,#0xc
000028  4351              MULS     r1,r2,r1
00002a  4a11              LDR      r2,|L2.112|
00002c  188b              ADDS     r3,r1,r2
00002e  689b              LDR      r3,[r3,#8]
000030  0a5b              LSRS     r3,r3,#9
;;;602                uint32_t vm_start = current_sector;
;;;603                uint32_t vm_end = current_sector + vm_sectors;
000032  18c3              ADDS     r3,r0,r3
;;;604    
;;;605                // Data can be used in this sector
;;;606                if ((requested_sector >= vm_start) && (requested_sector < vm_end)) {
000034  9300              STR      r3,[sp,#0]
000036  4284              CMP      r4,r0
000038  d30c              BCC      |L2.84|
00003a  429c              CMP      r4,r3
00003c  d20a              BCS      |L2.84|
;;;607                    uint32_t sector_offset;
;;;608                    uint32_t sectors_to_write = vm_end - requested_sector;
00003e  1b1f              SUBS     r7,r3,r4
;;;609                    sectors_to_write = MIN(sectors_to_write, num_sectors);
000040  42af              CMP      r7,r5
000042  d300              BCC      |L2.70|
000044  462f              MOV      r7,r5
                  |L2.70|
;;;610                    sector_offset = requested_sector - current_sector;
;;;611                    virtual_media_ffs[i].read_cb(sector_offset, buf, sectors_to_write);
000046  5853              LDR      r3,[r2,r1]
000048  1a20              SUBS     r0,r4,r0              ;610
00004a  463a              MOV      r2,r7
00004c  9903              LDR      r1,[sp,#0xc]
00004e  4798              BLX      r3
;;;612                    // Update requested sector
;;;613                    requested_sector += sectors_to_write;
000050  19e4              ADDS     r4,r4,r7
;;;614                    num_sectors -= sectors_to_write;
000052  1bed              SUBS     r5,r5,r7
                  |L2.84|
;;;615                }
;;;616    
;;;617                // If there is no more data to be read then break
;;;618                if (num_sectors == 0) {
000054  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
000056  d006              BEQ      |L2.102|
000058  4904              LDR      r1,|L2.108|
00005a  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1
00005c  68c9              LDR      r1,[r1,#0xc]          ;600  ; virtual_media_idx_ffs
00005e  b2f6              UXTB     r6,r6                 ;600
000060  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;600
000062  428e              CMP      r6,r1                 ;600
000064  d3de              BCC      |L2.36|
                  |L2.102|
;;;619                    break;
;;;620                }
;;;621    
;;;622                // Move to the next virtual media entry
;;;623                current_sector += vm_sectors;
;;;624            }
;;;625        }
;;;626        else
;;;627        {
;;;628            /* */
;;;629        }
;;;630    }
000066  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000068  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;631    
                          ENDP

00006a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L2.108|

                  |L2.112|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x6c0

                          AREA ||i.ffs_write||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  ffs_write PROC
;;;664    
;;;665    void ffs_write(uint32_t requested_sector, const uint8_t *buf, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b5f7              PUSH     {r0-r2,r4-r7,lr}
;;;666    {
000002  b082              SUB      sp,sp,#8
000004  4615              MOV      r5,r2
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;667        if (vfs_nvm_is_available()!=0u)
000008  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_is_available
00000c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00000e  d026              BEQ      |L3.94|
;;;668        {
;;;669            uint8_t i = 0;
;;;670            uint32_t current_sector;
;;;671            current_sector = 0;
;;;672    
;;;673            for (i = 0; i < virtual_media_idx_ffs; i++) {
000010  4914              LDR      r1,|L3.100|
000012  2600              MOVS     r6,#0                 ;669
000014  68ca              LDR      r2,[r1,#0xc]  ; virtual_media_idx_ffs
000016  4630              MOV      r0,r6                 ;671
000018  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
00001a  d920              BLS      |L3.94|
                  |L3.28|
;;;674                uint32_t vm_sectors = virtual_media_ffs[i].length / VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
00001c  210c              MOVS     r1,#0xc
00001e  4632              MOV      r2,r6
000020  434a              MULS     r2,r1,r2
000022  4911              LDR      r1,|L3.104|
000024  1852              ADDS     r2,r2,r1
000026  6891              LDR      r1,[r2,#8]
000028  0a49              LSRS     r1,r1,#9
;;;675                uint32_t vm_start = current_sector;
;;;676                uint32_t vm_end = current_sector + vm_sectors;
00002a  1841              ADDS     r1,r0,r1
;;;677    
;;;678                // Data can be used in this sector
;;;679                if ((requested_sector >= vm_start) && (requested_sector < vm_end)) {
00002c  9100              STR      r1,[sp,#0]
00002e  4284              CMP      r4,r0
000030  d30c              BCC      |L3.76|
000032  428c              CMP      r4,r1
000034  d20a              BCS      |L3.76|
;;;680                    uint32_t sector_offset;
;;;681                    uint32_t sectors_to_read = vm_end - requested_sector;
000036  1b0f              SUBS     r7,r1,r4
;;;682                    sectors_to_read = MIN(sectors_to_read, num_sectors);
000038  42af              CMP      r7,r5
00003a  d300              BCC      |L3.62|
00003c  462f              MOV      r7,r5
                  |L3.62|
;;;683                    sector_offset = requested_sector - current_sector;
;;;684                    virtual_media_ffs[i].write_cb(sector_offset, buf, sectors_to_read);
00003e  6853              LDR      r3,[r2,#4]
000040  1a20              SUBS     r0,r4,r0              ;683
000042  463a              MOV      r2,r7
000044  9903              LDR      r1,[sp,#0xc]
000046  4798              BLX      r3
;;;685                    // Update requested sector
;;;686                    requested_sector += sectors_to_read;
000048  19e4              ADDS     r4,r4,r7
;;;687                    num_sectors -= sectors_to_read;
00004a  1bed              SUBS     r5,r5,r7
                  |L3.76|
;;;688                }
;;;689    
;;;690                // If there is no more data to be read then break
;;;691                if (num_sectors == 0) {
00004c  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
00004e  d006              BEQ      |L3.94|
000050  4904              LDR      r1,|L3.100|
000052  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1
000054  68c9              LDR      r1,[r1,#0xc]          ;673  ; virtual_media_idx_ffs
000056  b2f6              UXTB     r6,r6                 ;673
000058  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;673
00005a  428e              CMP      r6,r1                 ;673
00005c  d3de              BCC      |L3.28|
                  |L3.94|
;;;692                    break;
;;;693                }
;;;694    
;;;695                // Move to the next virtual media entry
;;;696                current_sector += vm_sectors;
;;;697            }
;;;698        }
;;;699        else
;;;700        {
;;;701            /* */
;;;702        }
;;;703    }
00005e  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000060  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;704    
                          ENDP

000062  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L3.100|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L3.104|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x6c0

                          AREA ||i.file_change_cb_stub||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  file_change_cb_stub PROC
;;;997    
;;;998    static void file_change_cb_stub(const vfs_filename_t filename, vfs_file_change_t change, vfs_file_t file, vfs_file_t new_file_data)
000000  4770              BX       lr
;;;999    {
;;;1000       // Do nothing
;;;1001   }
;;;1002   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.filename_valid||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  filename_valid PROC
;;;1008   
;;;1009   static bool filename_valid(const vfs_filename_t  filename)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1010   {
000002  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
;;;1011       // Information on valid 8.3 filenames can be found in
;;;1012       // the microsoft hardware whitepaper:
;;;1013       //
;;;1014       // Microsoft Extensible Firmware Initiative
;;;1015       // FAT32 File System Specification
;;;1016       // FAT: General Overview of On-Disk Format
;;;1017       const char invalid_starting_chars[] = {
000004  a119              ADR      r1,|L5.108|
000006  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]
;;;1018           0xE5, // Deleted
;;;1019           0x00, // Deleted (and all following entries are free)
;;;1020           0x20, // Space not allowed as first character
;;;1021       };
;;;1022       uint32_t i;
;;;1023   
;;;1024       // Check for invalid starting characters
;;;1025       for (i = 0; i < sizeof(invalid_starting_chars); i++) {
000008  9104              STR      r1,[sp,#0x10]
;;;1026           if (invalid_starting_chars[i] == filename[0]) {
00000a  7803              LDRB     r3,[r0,#0]
00000c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;1025
00000e  aa04              ADD      r2,sp,#0x10           ;1017
                  |L5.16|
000010  5c54              LDRB     r4,[r2,r1]
000012  429c              CMP      r4,r3
000014  d027              BEQ      |L5.102|
000016  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000018  2903              CMP      r1,#3                 ;1025
00001a  d3f9              BCC      |L5.16|
00001c  a114              ADR      r1,|L5.112|
00001e  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]            ;1025
000020  688e              LDR      r6,[r1,#8]            ;1025
000022  4696              MOV      lr,r2                 ;1025
000024  684a              LDR      r2,[r1,#4]            ;1025
000026  68cd              LDR      r5,[r1,#0xc]          ;1025
;;;1027               return false;
;;;1028           }
;;;1029       }
;;;1030   
;;;1031       // Make sure all the characters are valid
;;;1032       for (i = 0; i < sizeof(vfs_filename_t); i++) {
000028  2300              MOVS     r3,#0
00002a  4694              MOV      r12,r2
                  |L5.44|
;;;1033           if (!filename_character_valid(filename[i])) {
00002c  5cc2              LDRB     r2,[r0,r3]
00002e  4671              MOV      r1,lr
000030  9100              STR      r1,[sp,#0]
000032  4611              MOV      r1,r2
000034  4664              MOV      r4,r12
000036  3961              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x61
000038  9602              STR      r6,[sp,#8]
00003a  9503              STR      r5,[sp,#0xc]
00003c  9401              STR      r4,[sp,#4]
00003e  2919              CMP      r1,#0x19
000040  d911              BLS      |L5.102|
000042  2a20              CMP      r2,#0x20
000044  d201              BCS      |L5.74|
000046  2a05              CMP      r2,#5
000048  d10d              BNE      |L5.102|
                  |L5.74|
00004a  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00004c  466c              MOV      r4,sp
                  |L5.78|
00004e  5c67              LDRB     r7,[r4,r1]
000050  4297              CMP      r7,r2
000052  d008              BEQ      |L5.102|
000054  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000056  2910              CMP      r1,#0x10
000058  d3f9              BCC      |L5.78|
00005a  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1
00005c  2b0b              CMP      r3,#0xb               ;1032
00005e  d3e5              BCC      |L5.44|
;;;1034               return false;
;;;1035           }
;;;1036       }
;;;1037   
;;;1038       // All checks have passed so filename is valid
;;;1039       return true;
000060  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;1040   }
000062  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000064  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L5.102|
000066  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1034
000068  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
00006a  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;1041   
                          ENDP

                  |L5.108|
00006c  e500              DCB      229,0
00006e  2000              DCB      " ",0
                  |L5.112|
000070  222a2b2c          DCB      """*+,./:;<=>?[\\]|"
000074  2e2f3a3b
000078  3c3d3e3f
00007c  5b5c5d7c

                          AREA ||i.read_dir||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  read_dir PROC
;;;929    
;;;930    static uint32_t read_dir(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;931    {
000002  4614              MOV      r4,r2
000004  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000006  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;932        if ((sector_offset + num_sectors) * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE > sizeof(dir_current)) {
000008  1900              ADDS     r0,r0,r4
00000a  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00000c  0240              LSLS     r0,r0,#9
00000e  0289              LSLS     r1,r1,#10
000010  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000012  d906              BLS      |L6.34|
;;;933            // Trying to read too much of the root directory
;;;934            util_assert(0);
000014  4a0b              LDR      r2,|L6.68|
000016  a10c              ADR      r1,|L6.72|
000018  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
;;;935            return 0;
00001e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;936        }
;;;937       
;;;938        // Zero buffer data is VFS_SECTOR_SIZE max
;;;939        memset(data, 0, VFS_SECTOR_SIZE);
;;;940    
;;;941        if (sector_offset == 0) { //Handle the first 512 bytes
;;;942            // Copy data that is actually created in the directory
;;;943            memcpy(data, &dir_current.f[0], dir_idx*sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
;;;944        }
;;;945    
;;;946        return num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
;;;947    }
000020  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L6.34|
000022  2101              MOVS     r1,#1                 ;939
000024  0249              LSLS     r1,r1,#9              ;939
000026  4630              MOV      r0,r6                 ;939
000028  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
00002c  2d00              CMP      r5,#0                 ;941
00002e  d106              BNE      |L6.62|
000030  4812              LDR      r0,|L6.124|
000032  4913              LDR      r1,|L6.128|
000034  6940              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x14]         ;943  ; dir_idx
000036  0142              LSLS     r2,r0,#5              ;943
000038  4630              MOV      r0,r6                 ;943
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
                  |L6.62|
00003e  0260              LSLS     r0,r4,#9              ;946
000040  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;948    
                          ENDP

000042  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L6.68|
                          DCD      0x000003a6
                  |L6.72|
000048  2e2e5c2e          DCB      "..\\..\\..\\source\\daplink\\drag-n-drop\\virtual_fs.c",0
00004c  2e5c2e2e
000050  5c736f75
000054  7263655c
000058  6461706c
00005c  696e6b5c
000060  64726167
000064  2d6e2d64
000068  726f705c
00006c  76697274
000070  75616c5f
000074  66732e63
000078  00      
000079  00                DCB      0
00007a  00                DCB      0
00007b  00                DCB      0
                  |L6.124|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L6.128|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x780

                          AREA ||i.read_fat||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  read_fat PROC
;;;903    
;;;904    static uint32_t read_fat(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;905    {
;;;906        uint32_t read_size = sizeof(file_allocation_table_t);
000002  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
000004  0264              LSLS     r4,r4,#9
000006  460b              MOV      r3,r1                 ;905
;;;907        COMPILER_ASSERT(sizeof(file_allocation_table_t) <= VFS_SECTOR_SIZE);
;;;908    
;;;909        if (sector_offset != 0) {
000008  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00000a  d001              BEQ      |L7.16|
;;;910            // Don't worry about reading other sectors
;;;911            return 0;
00000c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;912        }
;;;913    
;;;914        memcpy(data, &fat, read_size);
;;;915        return read_size;
;;;916    }
00000e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L7.16|
000010  4622              MOV      r2,r4                 ;914
000012  4903              LDR      r1,|L7.32|
000014  4618              MOV      r0,r3                 ;914
000016  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
00001a  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;915
00001c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;917    
                          ENDP

00001e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L7.32|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x400

                          AREA ||i.read_flash_dir||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  read_flash_dir PROC
;;;704    
;;;705    uint32_t read_flash_dir(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;706    {
000002  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;707        uint32_t byte_offset = sector_offset * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
000004  0241              LSLS     r1,r0,#9
;;;708        uint32_t num_bytes = num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
000006  0254              LSLS     r4,r2,#9
;;;709    
;;;710        vfs_nvm_read_DIR(data, byte_offset, num_bytes);
000008  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00000a  4618              MOV      r0,r3
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_DIR
;;;711    
;;;712    	return num_bytes;
000010  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;713    }
000012  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;714    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.read_flash_fat||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  read_flash_fat PROC
;;;917    
;;;918    static uint32_t read_flash_fat(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;919    {
000002  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;920        vfs_nvm_read_FAT(data, (sector_offset * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE), (num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE));
000004  0252              LSLS     r2,r2,#9
000006  0241              LSLS     r1,r0,#9
000008  4614              MOV      r4,r2
00000a  4618              MOV      r0,r3
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_FAT
000010  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;921    
;;;922        return num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
;;;923    }
000012  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;924    
                          ENDP

                  read_flash_file PROC
;;;751    
;;;752    uint32_t read_flash_file(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}

;;;754        uint32_t byte_offset = sector_offset * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
000004  0241              LSLS     r1,r0,#9
;;;755        uint32_t num_bytes = num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;

;;;756

00000a  4618              MOV      r0,r3
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_FILE
;;;758    
;;;759        return num_bytes;
000010  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;760    }
000012  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;761    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.read_flash_mbr||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  read_flash_mbr PROC
;;;887    
;;;888    static uint32_t read_flash_mbr(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;889    {
;;;890        uint32_t read_size = sizeof(mbr_t);
000002  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
000004  0264              LSLS     r4,r4,#9
000006  460b              MOV      r3,r1                 ;889
;;;891        COMPILER_ASSERT(sizeof(mbr_t) <= VFS_SECTOR_SIZE);
;;;892    
;;;893        if (sector_offset != 0) {
000008  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00000a  d001              BEQ      |L11.16|
;;;894            // Don't worry about reading other sectors
;;;895            return 0;
00000c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;896        }
;;;897    
;;;898        memcpy(data, &mbr_ffs, read_size);
;;;899        return read_size;
;;;900    }
00000e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L11.16|
000010  4622              MOV      r2,r4                 ;898
000012  4903              LDR      r1,|L11.32|
000014  4618              MOV      r0,r3                 ;898
000016  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
00001a  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;899
00001c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;901    
                          ENDP

00001e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L11.32|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x200

                          AREA ||i.read_mbr||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  read_mbr PROC
;;;873    
;;;874    static uint32_t read_mbr(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;875    {
;;;876        uint32_t read_size = sizeof(mbr_t);
000002  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
000004  0264              LSLS     r4,r4,#9
000006  460b              MOV      r3,r1                 ;875
;;;877        COMPILER_ASSERT(sizeof(mbr_t) <= VFS_SECTOR_SIZE);
;;;878    
;;;879        if (sector_offset != 0) {
000008  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00000a  d001              BEQ      |L12.16|
;;;880            // Don't worry about reading other sectors
;;;881            return 0;
00000c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;882        }
;;;883    
;;;884        memcpy(data, &mbr, read_size);
;;;885        return read_size;
;;;886    }
00000e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L12.16|
000010  4622              MOV      r2,r4                 ;884
000012  4903              LDR      r1,|L12.32|
000014  4618              MOV      r0,r3                 ;884
000016  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
00001a  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;885
00001c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;887    
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.read_zero||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  read_zero PROC
;;;861    
;;;862    static uint32_t read_zero(uint32_t sector_offset, uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;863    {
000002  4608              MOV      r0,r1
;;;864        uint32_t read_size = VFS_SECTOR_SIZE * num_sectors;
000004  0254              LSLS     r4,r2,#9
;;;865        memset(data, 0, read_size);
000006  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000008  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
;;;866        return read_size;
00000c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;867    }
00000e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;868    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.vfs_create_file||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  vfs_create_file PROC
;;;457    
;;;458    vfs_file_t vfs_create_file(const vfs_filename_t filename, vfs_read_cb_t read_cb, vfs_write_cb_t write_cb, uint32_t len)
000000  b5ff              PUSH     {r0-r7,lr}
;;;459    {
000002  b083              SUB      sp,sp,#0xc
000004  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;460        uint32_t first_cluster;
;;;461        FatDirectoryEntry_t *de;
;;;462        uint32_t clusters;
;;;463        uint32_t cluster_size;
;;;464        uint32_t i;
;;;465        util_assert(filename_valid(filename));
000006  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
000008  f7fffffe          BL       filename_valid
00000c  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
00000e  32d2              ADDS     r2,r2,#0xd2
000010  a14e              ADR      r1,|L14.332|
000012  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
;;;466        // Compute the number of clusters in the file
;;;467        cluster_size = mbr.bytes_per_sector * mbr.sectors_per_cluster;
000016  485a              LDR      r0,|L14.384|
000018  9002              STR      r0,[sp,#8]
00001a  7a41              LDRB     r1,[r0,#9]  ; mbr
00001c  7a00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#8]  ; mbr
00001e  0209              LSLS     r1,r1,#8
000020  4301              ORRS     r1,r1,r0
000022  4858              LDR      r0,|L14.388|
000024  7b40              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xd]  ; mbr
000026  4341              MULS     r1,r0,r1
;;;468        clusters = (len + cluster_size - 1) / cluster_size;
000028  1878              ADDS     r0,r7,r1
00002a  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
;;;469        // Write the cluster chain to the fat table
;;;470        first_cluster = 0;
000030  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;471    
;;;472        if (len > 0) {
000032  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
000034  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
000036  d02e              BEQ      |L14.150|
;;;473            first_cluster = fat_idx;
000038  4853              LDR      r0,|L14.392|
;;;474    
;;;475            for (i = 0; i < clusters - 1; i++) {
00003a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00003c  6905              LDR      r5,[r0,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
00003e  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000040  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000042  d01f              BEQ      |L14.132|
000044  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
000046  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;462
000048  0276              LSLS     r6,r6,#9              ;462
00004a  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;462
00004c  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]
                  |L14.78|
;;;476                write_fat_internal(&fat, fat_idx, fat_idx + 1);
00004e  484e              LDR      r0,|L14.392|
000050  4a4e              LDR      r2,|L14.396|
000052  6900              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
000054  1c41              ADDS     r1,r0,#1
000056  0043              LSLS     r3,r0,#1
000058  1c58              ADDS     r0,r3,#1
00005a  b289              UXTH     r1,r1
00005c  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
00005e  d306              BCC      |L14.110|
000060  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000062  321a              ADDS     r2,r2,#0x1a
000064  a14a              ADR      r1,|L14.400|
000066  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000068  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
00006c  e002              B        |L14.116|
                  |L14.110|
00006e  54d1              STRB     r1,[r2,r3]
000070  0a09              LSRS     r1,r1,#8
000072  5411              STRB     r1,[r2,r0]
                  |L14.116|
;;;477                fat_idx++;
000074  4844              LDR      r0,|L14.392|
000076  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
000078  6901              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
00007a  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
00007c  6101              STR      r1,[r0,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
00007e  9801              LDR      r0,[sp,#4]            ;475
000080  4284              CMP      r4,r0                 ;475
000082  d3e4              BCC      |L14.78|
                  |L14.132|
;;;478            }
;;;479    
;;;480            write_fat_internal(&fat, fat_idx, 0xFFFF);
000084  4c40              LDR      r4,|L14.392|
000086  4a4f              LDR      r2,|L14.452|
000088  4840              LDR      r0,|L14.396|
00008a  6921              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
00008c  f7fffffe          BL       write_fat_internal
;;;481            fat_idx++;
000090  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
000092  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000094  6120              STR      r0,[r4,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
                  |L14.150|
;;;482        }
;;;483    
;;;484        // Update directory entry
;;;485        if (dir_idx >= ELEMENTS_IN_ARRAY(dir_current.f)) {
000096  4e3c              LDR      r6,|L14.392|
000098  6970              LDR      r0,[r6,#0x14]  ; dir_idx
00009a  2820              CMP      r0,#0x20
00009c  d308              BCC      |L14.176|
;;;486            util_assert(0);
00009e  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
0000a0  32e7              ADDS     r2,r2,#0xe7
0000a2  a12a              ADR      r1,|L14.332|
0000a4  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0000a6  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
;;;487            return VFS_FILE_INVALID;
0000aa  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;488        }
;;;489    
;;;490        de = &dir_current.f[dir_idx];
;;;491        dir_idx++;
;;;492        memcpy(de, &dir_entry_tmpl, sizeof(dir_entry_tmpl));
;;;493        memcpy(de->filename, filename, 11);
;;;494        de->filesize = len;
;;;495        de->first_cluster_high_16 = (first_cluster >> 16) & 0xFFFF;
;;;496        de->first_cluster_low_16 = (first_cluster >> 0) & 0xFFFF;
;;;497    
;;;498        // Update virtual media
;;;499        if (virtual_media_idx >= ELEMENTS_IN_ARRAY(virtual_media)) {
;;;500            util_assert(0);
;;;501            return VFS_FILE_INVALID;
;;;502        }
;;;503    
;;;504        virtual_media[virtual_media_idx].read_cb = read_zero;
;;;505        virtual_media[virtual_media_idx].write_cb = write_none;
;;;506    
;;;507        if (0 != read_cb) {
;;;508            virtual_media[virtual_media_idx].read_cb = read_cb;
;;;509        }
;;;510    
;;;511        if (0 != write_cb) {
;;;512            virtual_media[virtual_media_idx].write_cb = write_cb;
;;;513        }
;;;514    
;;;515        virtual_media[virtual_media_idx].length = clusters * mbr.bytes_per_sector * mbr.sectors_per_cluster;
;;;516        virtual_media_idx++;
;;;517        file_count += 1;
;;;518        return de;
;;;519    }
0000ac  b007              ADD      sp,sp,#0x1c
0000ae  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L14.176|
0000b0  0141              LSLS     r1,r0,#5              ;490

;;;538    uint32_t vfs_file_get_size(vfs_file_t file)

000004  780a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0]

000008  784a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#1]

00000c  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
00000e  788a              LDRB     r2,[r1,#2]
000010  78c9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#3]
000012  0412              LSLS     r2,r2,#16
000014  4310              ORRS     r0,r0,r2
000016  0609              LSLS     r1,r1,#24
000018  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
;;;542    }
00001a  4770              BX       lr
;;;543    
                          ENDP

                  vfs_file_get_start_sector PROC
;;;526    
;;;527    vfs_sector_t vfs_file_get_start_sector(vfs_file_t file)
000000  211c              MOVS     r1,#0x1c
000002  1842              ADDS     r2,r0,r1

000008  7853              LDRB     r3,[r2,#1]

00000e  7893              LDRB     r3,[r2,#2]

000014  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3

000018  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
;;;528    {
;;;529        FatDirectoryEntry_t *de = file;
;;;530    
;;;531        if (vfs_file_get_size(file) == 0) {
00001a  d101              BNE      |L17.32|
;;;532            return VFS_INVALID_SECTOR;
00001c  1e48              SUBS     r0,r1,#1
;;;533        }
;;;534    
;;;535        return cluster_to_sector(de->first_cluster_low_16);
;;;536    }
00001e  4770              BX       lr

                          AREA ||i.vfs_find_flash_file||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  vfs_find_flash_file PROC
;;;818    
;;;819    uint8_t vfs_find_flash_file(vfs_filename_t filename, uint16_t * const first_cluster, uint32_t * const filesize)
000000  b5f7              PUSH     {r0-r2,r4-r7,lr}
;;;820    {
;;;821        uint16_t addr = 0u;
000002  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000004  b088              SUB      sp,sp,#0x20           ;820
;;;822        uint8_t result = 0u;
;;;823        FatDirectoryEntry_t de;
;;;824    
;;;825        *first_cluster = 0xFFFFu;
000006  1e60              SUBS     r0,r4,#1
000008  8008              STRH     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;826        *filesize = 0u;
;;;827    
;;;828        if (filename_valid(filename)!=0u)
00000a  6014              STR      r4,[r2,#0]
00000c  4616              MOV      r6,r2                 ;820
00000e  460f              MOV      r7,r1                 ;820
000010  4625              MOV      r5,r4                 ;822
000012  9808              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x20]
000014  f7fffffe          BL       filename_valid
000018  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00001a  d012              BEQ      |L19.66|
                  |L19.28|
;;;829        {
;;;830            for (addr = 0u; addr < VFS_NVM_DIR_SIZE; addr+=sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t))
;;;831            {
;;;832                vfs_nvm_read_DIR((uint8_t*)(&de), addr, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
00001c  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
00001e  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000020  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000022  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_DIR
;;;833    
;;;834                if (vfs_strncmp(de.filename, filename) == 0u)
000026  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000028  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb
00002a  9908              LDR      r1,[sp,#0x20]
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       strncmp
000030  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000032  d009              BEQ      |L19.72|
;;;835                {
;;;836                    // filename is matching, finalize
;;;837                    *first_cluster = de.first_cluster_low_16;
;;;838                    *filesize = de.filesize;
;;;839    
;;;840                    // terminate the for loop
;;;841                    addr = VFS_NVM_DIR_SIZE;
;;;842    
;;;843                    result = 1u;
;;;844                }
;;;845                else
;;;846                {
;;;847                    // filename is not matching, continue searching
;;;848                    result = 0u;
000034  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
                  |L19.54|
000036  3420              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x20
000038  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;830
00003a  b2a4              UXTH     r4,r4                 ;830
00003c  0300              LSLS     r0,r0,#12             ;830
00003e  4284              CMP      r4,r0                 ;830
000040  d3ec              BCC      |L19.28|
                  |L19.66|
;;;849                }
;;;850            }
;;;851        }
;;;852        else
;;;853        {
;;;854            // filename is invalid, skip
;;;855            result = 0u;
;;;856        }
;;;857    
;;;858        return result;
000042  4628              MOV      r0,r5
;;;859    }
000044  b00b              ADD      sp,sp,#0x2c
000046  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L19.72|
000048  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;837
00004a  8b40              LDRH     r0,[r0,#0x1a]         ;837
00004c  8038              STRH     r0,[r7,#0]            ;837
00004e  2401              MOVS     r4,#1                 ;841
000050  9807              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x1c]         ;838
000052  0324              LSLS     r4,r4,#12             ;841
000054  2501              MOVS     r5,#1                 ;843
000056  6030              STR      r0,[r6,#0]            ;843
000058  e7ed              B        |L19.54|
;;;860    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.vfs_get_flash_names_srtd||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  vfs_get_flash_names_srtd PROC
;;;769    
;;;770    uint8_t vfs_get_flash_names_srtd(vfs_filename_t* filename, uint8_t max_count)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;771    {
000002  b089              SUB      sp,sp,#0x24
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
;;;772        uint16_t addr = 0u;
000006  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;773        uint8_t filenames_found = 0u;
000008  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8
00000a  460e              MOV      r6,r1                 ;771
00000c  462c              MOV      r4,r5
;;;774        FatDirectoryEntry_t de;
;;;775    
;;;776        for (addr = 0u; addr < VFS_NVM_DIR_SIZE; addr+=sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t))
;;;777        {
;;;778            vfs_nvm_read_DIR((uint8_t*)(&de), addr, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
;;;779    
;;;780            if (filename_valid(de.filename) != 0u)
;;;781            {
;;;782                if ((vfs_strncmp((de.filename), "SELECTR HEX")!=0) && ((de.attributes & VFS_FILE_ATTR_HIDDEN) == 0u))
;;;783                {
;;;784                    if (strncmp("HEX", (const char *)(&(de.filename[8])), 3) == 0)
00000e  9008              STR      r0,[sp,#0x20]
                  |L20.16|
000010  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20              ;778
000012  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;778
000014  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;778
000016  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_DIR
00001a  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;780
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       filename_valid
000020  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;780
000022  d01f              BEQ      |L20.100|
000024  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;782
000026  a117              ADR      r1,|L20.132|
000028  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb               ;782
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       strncmp
00002e  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;782
000030  d018              BEQ      |L20.100|
000032  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;782
000034  7ac0              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0xb]          ;782
000036  0780              LSLS     r0,r0,#30             ;782
000038  d414              BMI      |L20.100|
00003a  2203              MOVS     r2,#3
00003c  a013              ADR      r0,|L20.140|
00003e  9908              LDR      r1,[sp,#0x20]
000040  f7fffffe          BL       strncmp
000044  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000046  d10d              BNE      |L20.100|
;;;785                    {
;;;786                        if (filenames_found < max_count)
000048  42b4              CMP      r4,r6
00004a  d209              BCS      |L20.96|
;;;787                        {
;;;788                            memcpy(&(filename[filenames_found]), &(de.filename), sizeof(vfs_filename_t));
00004c  200b              MOVS     r0,#0xb
00004e  4360              MULS     r0,r4,r0
000050  19c0              ADDS     r0,r0,r7
000052  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb
000054  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000056  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
00005a  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
;;;789                            filenames_found++;
00005c  b2e4              UXTB     r4,r4
00005e  e001              B        |L20.100|
                  |L20.96|
;;;790                        }
;;;791                        else
;;;792                        {
;;;793                            // filename buffer full
;;;794                            // terminate the for loop
;;;795                            addr = VFS_NVM_DIR_SIZE;
000060  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
000062  032d              LSLS     r5,r5,#12
                  |L20.100|
000064  3520              ADDS     r5,r5,#0x20
000066  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;776
000068  b2ad              UXTH     r5,r5                 ;776
00006a  0300              LSLS     r0,r0,#12             ;776
00006c  4285              CMP      r5,r0                 ;776
00006e  d3cf              BCC      |L20.16|
;;;796                        }
;;;797                    }
;;;798                    else
;;;799                    {
;;;800                        // skip non-HEX files
;;;801                    }
;;;802                }
;;;803                else
;;;804                {
;;;805                    // skip the "selector" file and hidden files
;;;806                }
;;;807            }
;;;808            else
;;;809            {
;;;810                // filename invalid, not a file?
;;;811            }
;;;812        }
;;;813    
;;;814        qsort(filename, filenames_found, sizeof(vfs_filename_t), vfs_strncmp);
000070  4b07              LDR      r3,|L20.144|
000072  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb
000074  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000076  4638              MOV      r0,r7
000078  f7fffffe          BL       qsort
;;;815    
;;;816        return filenames_found;
00007c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;817    }
00007e  b009              ADD      sp,sp,#0x24
000080  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;818    
                          ENDP

000082  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L20.132|
000084  53454c45          DCB      "SELECTR "
000088  43545220
                  |L20.140|
00008c  48455800          DCB      "HEX",0
                  |L20.144|
                          DCD      vfs_strncmp

                          AREA ||i.vfs_get_total_size||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  vfs_get_total_size PROC
;;;443    
;;;444    uint32_t vfs_get_total_size()
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;445    {
;;;446        uint32_t size;
;;;447        if (mbr.total_logical_sectors > 0) {
000002  490d              LDR      r1,|L21.56|
000004  7d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0x14]  ; mbr
000006  7cca              LDRB     r2,[r1,#0x13]  ; mbr
000008  0204              LSLS     r4,r0,#8
;;;448            size = mbr.total_logical_sectors * mbr.bytes_per_sector;
00000a  7b08              LDRB     r0,[r1,#0xc]
00000c  7ac9              LDRB     r1,[r1,#0xb]
00000e  0200              LSLS     r0,r0,#8
000010  4314              ORRS     r4,r4,r2              ;447
000012  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000014  2c00              CMP      r4,#0                 ;447
000016  d103              BNE      |L21.32|
;;;449        } else if (mbr.big_sectors_on_drive > 0) {
000018  4907              LDR      r1,|L21.56|
00001a  6a0c              LDR      r4,[r1,#0x20]  ; mbr
00001c  2c00              CMP      r4,#0
00001e  d001              BEQ      |L21.36|
                  |L21.32|
;;;450            size = mbr.big_sectors_on_drive * mbr.bytes_per_sector;
000020  4344              MULS     r4,r0,r4
000022  e006              B        |L21.50|
                  |L21.36|
;;;451        } else {
;;;452            size = 0;
000024  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;453            util_assert(0);
000026  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000028  32c6              ADDS     r2,r2,#0xc6
00002a  a104              ADR      r1,|L21.60|
00002c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
                  |L21.50|
;;;454        }
;;;455        return size;
000032  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;456    }
000034  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;457    
                          ENDP

000036  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L21.56|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L21.60|
00003c  2e2e5c2e          DCB      "..\\..\\..\\source\\daplink\\drag-n-drop\\virtual_fs.c",0
000040  2e5c2e2e
000044  5c736f75
000048  7263655c
00004c  6461706c
000050  696e6b5c
000054  64726167
000058  2d6e2d64
00005c  726f705c
000060  76697274
000064  75616c5f
000068  66732e63
00006c  00      
00006d  00                DCB      0
00006e  00                DCB      0
00006f  00                DCB      0

                          AREA ||i.vfs_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  vfs_init PROC
;;;288    
;;;289    void vfs_init(const vfs_filename_t drive_name, uint32_t disk_size)
000000  b5f3              PUSH     {r0,r1,r4-r7,lr}
;;;290    {
;;;291        uint32_t i;
;;;292        uint32_t num_clusters;
;;;293        uint32_t total_sectors;
;;;294        // Clear everything
;;;295        memset(&mbr, 0, sizeof(mbr));
000002  2701              MOVS     r7,#1
000004  460e              MOV      r6,r1                 ;290
000006  027f              LSLS     r7,r7,#9
000008  b081              SUB      sp,sp,#4              ;290
00000a  4639              MOV      r1,r7
00000c  4850              LDR      r0,|L22.336|
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;296        memset(&fat, 0, sizeof(fat));
000012  4639              MOV      r1,r7
000014  484f              LDR      r0,|L22.340|
000016  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;297        fat_idx = 0;
00001a  4d4f              LDR      r5,|L22.344|
00001c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;298        memset(&virtual_media, 0, sizeof(virtual_media));
00001e  21c0              MOVS     r1,#0xc0
000020  484e              LDR      r0,|L22.348|
000022  612c              STR      r4,[r5,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
000024  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;299        memset(&dir_current, 0, sizeof(dir_current));
000028  0079              LSLS     r1,r7,#1
00002a  484d              LDR      r0,|L22.352|
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr4
;;;300        dir_idx = 0;
;;;301        file_count = 0;
000030  616c              STR      r4,[r5,#0x14]  ; dir_idx
000032  702c              STRB     r4,[r5,#0]
;;;302        file_change_cb = file_change_cb_stub;
;;;303        virtual_media_idx = 0;
;;;304        data_start = 0;
000034  60ac              STR      r4,[r5,#8]  ; virtual_media_idx
000036  484b              LDR      r0,|L22.356|
;;;305    
;;;306        // Initialize MBR
;;;307        memcpy(&mbr, &mbr_tmpl, sizeof(mbr_t));
000038  61ac              STR      r4,[r5,#0x18]  ; data_start
00003a  6068              STR      r0,[r5,#4]  ; file_change_cb
00003c  463a              MOV      r2,r7
00003e  494a              LDR      r1,|L22.360|
000040  4843              LDR      r0,|L22.336|
000042  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;308        mbr.signature = 0xAA55u;
000046  484a              LDR      r0,|L22.368|
000048  4948              LDR      r1,|L22.364|
00004a  7701              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x1c]
00004c  0a09              LSRS     r1,r1,#8
;;;309        total_sectors = ((disk_size + KB(64)) / mbr.bytes_per_sector);
00004e  4d40              LDR      r5,|L22.336|
000050  7741              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x1d]         ;308
000052  7b28              LDRB     r0,[r5,#0xc]  ; mbr
000054  7aea              LDRB     r2,[r5,#0xb]  ; mbr
000056  0201              LSLS     r1,r0,#8
000058  01ff              LSLS     r7,r7,#7
00005a  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
00005c  19f0              ADDS     r0,r6,r7
00005e  1ced              ADDS     r5,r5,#3
000060  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
;;;310    
;;;311        // Make sure this is the right size for a FAT16 volume
;;;312        if (total_sectors < FAT_CLUSTERS_MIN * mbr.sectors_per_cluster) {
000064  1eee              SUBS     r6,r5,#3
000066  7b71              LDRB     r1,[r6,#0xd]  ; mbr
000068  4a42              LDR      r2,|L22.372|
00006a  434a              MULS     r2,r1,r2
00006c  4282              CMP      r2,r0
00006e  d908              BLS      |L22.130|
;;;313            util_assert(0);
000070  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000072  323a              ADDS     r2,r2,#0x3a
000074  a140              ADR      r1,|L22.376|
000076  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000078  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
;;;314            total_sectors = FAT_CLUSTERS_MIN * mbr.sectors_per_cluster;
00007c  7b70              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0xd]  ; mbr
00007e  493d              LDR      r1,|L22.372|
000080  e00b              B        |L22.154|
                  |L22.130|
;;;315        } else if (total_sectors > FAT_CLUSTERS_MAX * mbr.sectors_per_cluster) {
000082  4a4a              LDR      r2,|L22.428|
000084  4351              MULS     r1,r2,r1
000086  4281              CMP      r1,r0
000088  d208              BCS      |L22.156|
;;;316            util_assert(0);
00008a  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
00008c  323d              ADDS     r2,r2,#0x3d
00008e  a13a              ADR      r1,|L22.376|
000090  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000092  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
;;;317            total_sectors = FAT_CLUSTERS_MAX * mbr.sectors_per_cluster;
000096  7b70              LDRB     r0,[r6,#0xd]  ; mbr
000098  4944              LDR      r1,|L22.428|
                  |L22.154|
00009a  4348              MULS     r0,r1,r0
                  |L22.156|
;;;318        }
;;;319        if (total_sectors >= 0x10000) {
00009c  42b8              CMP      r0,r7
00009e  d305              BCC      |L22.172|
;;;320            mbr.total_logical_sectors = 0;
0000a0  742c              STRB     r4,[r5,#0x10]
0000a2  0a21              LSRS     r1,r4,#8
0000a4  7469              STRB     r1,[r5,#0x11]
;;;321            mbr.big_sectors_on_drive  = total_sectors;  
0000a6  492a              LDR      r1,|L22.336|
0000a8  6208              STR      r0,[r1,#0x20]  ; mbr
0000aa  e004              B        |L22.182|
                  |L22.172|
;;;322        } else {
;;;323            mbr.total_logical_sectors = total_sectors;
0000ac  7428              STRB     r0,[r5,#0x10]
0000ae  0a01              LSRS     r1,r0,#8
0000b0  7469              STRB     r1,[r5,#0x11]
;;;324            mbr.big_sectors_on_drive  = 0;  
0000b2  4927              LDR      r1,|L22.336|
0000b4  620c              STR      r4,[r1,#0x20]  ; mbr
                  |L22.182|
;;;325        }
;;;326        // FAT table will likely be larger than needed, but this is allowed by the
;;;327        // fat specification
;;;328        num_clusters = total_sectors / mbr.sectors_per_cluster;
0000b6  7b71              LDRB     r1,[r6,#0xd]  ; mbr
0000b8  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_uidivmod
;;;329        mbr.logical_sectors_per_fat = (num_clusters * 2 + VFS_SECTOR_SIZE - 1) / VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
0000bc  493c              LDR      r1,|L22.432|
0000be  0200              LSLS     r0,r0,#8
0000c0  1840              ADDS     r0,r0,r1
0000c2  0c02              LSRS     r2,r0,#16
;;;330        // Initailize virtual media
;;;331        memcpy(&virtual_media, &virtual_media_tmpl, sizeof(virtual_media_tmpl));
0000c4  493b              LDR      r1,|L22.436|
0000c6  82f2              STRH     r2,[r6,#0x16]         ;329
0000c8  c9e8              LDM      r1!,{r3,r5-r7}
0000ca  4824              LDR      r0,|L22.348|
0000cc  c0e8              STM      r0!,{r3,r5-r7}
0000ce  68ce              LDR      r6,[r1,#0xc]  ; virtual_media_tmpl
0000d0  688d              LDR      r5,[r1,#8]  ; virtual_media_tmpl
0000d2  680b              LDR      r3,[r1,#0]  ; virtual_media_tmpl
0000d4  60c6              STR      r6,[r0,#0xc]  ; virtual_media
0000d6  6085              STR      r5,[r0,#8]  ; virtual_media
0000d8  6003              STR      r3,[r0,#0]  ; virtual_media
0000da  698d              LDR      r5,[r1,#0x18]  ; virtual_media_tmpl
0000dc  694b              LDR      r3,[r1,#0x14]  ; virtual_media_tmpl
0000de  69c9              LDR      r1,[r1,#0x1c]  ; virtual_media_tmpl
;;;332        virtual_media[MEDIA_IDX_FAT1].length = VFS_SECTOR_SIZE * mbr.logical_sectors_per_fat;
0000e0  6185              STR      r5,[r0,#0x18]  ; virtual_media
0000e2  6143              STR      r3,[r0,#0x14]  ; virtual_media
0000e4  61c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0x1c]  ; virtual_media
0000e6  0251              LSLS     r1,r2,#9
;;;333        virtual_media[MEDIA_IDX_FAT2].length = VFS_SECTOR_SIZE * mbr.logical_sectors_per_fat;
0000e8  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]  ; virtual_media
;;;334        // Initialize indexes
;;;335        virtual_media_idx = MEDIA_IDX_COUNT;
0000ea  6101              STR      r1,[r0,#0x10]  ; virtual_media
0000ec  4d1a              LDR      r5,|L22.344|
0000ee  2104              MOVS     r1,#4
;;;336    
;;;337        data_start = 0;
;;;338    
;;;339        for (i = 0; i < ELEMENTS_IN_ARRAY(virtual_media_tmpl); i++) {
0000f0  61ac              STR      r4,[r5,#0x18]  ; data_start
0000f2  60a9              STR      r1,[r5,#8]  ; virtual_media_idx
0000f4  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
0000f6  3810              SUBS     r0,r0,#0x10
                  |L22.248|
;;;340            data_start += virtual_media[i].length;
0000f8  220c              MOVS     r2,#0xc
0000fa  434a              MULS     r2,r1,r2
0000fc  1812              ADDS     r2,r2,r0
0000fe  6892              LDR      r2,[r2,#8]
000100  69ab              LDR      r3,[r5,#0x18]  ; data_start
000102  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000104  18d2              ADDS     r2,r2,r3
000106  61aa              STR      r2,[r5,#0x18]         ;339  ; data_start
000108  2904              CMP      r1,#4                 ;339
00010a  d3f5              BCC      |L22.248|
;;;341        }
;;;342    
;;;343        // Initialize FAT
;;;344        fat_idx = 0;
;;;345        write_fat_internal(&fat, fat_idx, 0xFFF8);    // Media type "media_descriptor"
00010c  4a2a              LDR      r2,|L22.440|
00010e  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000110  4810              LDR      r0,|L22.340|
000112  612c              STR      r4,[r5,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
000114  f7fffffe          BL       write_fat_internal
;;;346        fat_idx++;
000118  6929              LDR      r1,[r5,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
;;;347        write_fat_internal(&fat, fat_idx, 0xFFFF);    // FAT12 - always 0xFFF (no meaning), FAT16 - dirty/clean (clean = 0xFFFF)
00011a  4a28              LDR      r2,|L22.444|
00011c  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1              ;346
00011e  480d              LDR      r0,|L22.340|
000120  6129              STR      r1,[r5,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
000122  f7fffffe          BL       write_fat_internal
;;;348        fat_idx++;
000126  6928              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
;;;349        // Initialize root dir
;;;350        dir_idx = 0;
;;;351        dir_current.f[dir_idx] = root_dir_entry;
000128  616c              STR      r4,[r5,#0x14]  ; dir_idx
00012a  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1              ;348
00012c  4c0c              LDR      r4,|L22.352|
00012e  6128              STR      r0,[r5,#0x10]  ; fat_idx
000130  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000132  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
000134  4922              LDR      r1,|L22.448|
000136  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;352        memcpy(dir_current.f[dir_idx].filename, drive_name, sizeof(dir_current.f[0].filename));
00013a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00013c  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb
00013e  9901              LDR      r1,[sp,#4]
000140  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;353        dir_idx++;
000144  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;354    
;;;355        ffs_init();
000146  6168              STR      r0,[r5,#0x14]  ; dir_idx
000148  f7fffffe          BL       ffs_init
;;;356    
;;;357    }
00014c  b003              ADD      sp,sp,#0xc
00014e  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;358    
                          ENDP

                  |L22.336|
                          DCD      ||.bss||
                  |L22.340|
