                          AREA ||i.vfs_read||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  vfs_read PROC
;;;554    
;;;555    void vfs_read(uint32_t requested_sector, uint8_t *buf, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b5f7              PUSH     {r0-r2,r4-r7,lr}
;;;556    {
000002  b082              SUB      sp,sp,#8
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  4615              MOV      r5,r2
;;;557        uint8_t i = 0;
000008  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;558        uint32_t current_sector;
;;;559        // Zero out the buffer
;;;560        memset(buf, 0, num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE);
00000a  0251              LSLS     r1,r2,#9
00000c  9803              LDR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
;;;561        current_sector = 0;
;;;562    
;;;563        for (i = 0; i < virtual_media_idx; i++) {
000012  4914              LDR      r1,|L23.100|
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;561
000016  688a              LDR      r2,[r1,#8]  ; virtual_media_idx
000018  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
00001a  d920              BLS      |L23.94|
                  |L23.28|
;;;564            uint32_t vm_sectors = virtual_media[i].length / VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
00001c  4631              MOV      r1,r6
00001e  220c              MOVS     r2,#0xc
000020  4351              MULS     r1,r2,r1
000022  4a11              LDR      r2,|L23.104|
000024  188b              ADDS     r3,r1,r2
000026  689b              LDR      r3,[r3,#8]
000028  0a5b              LSRS     r3,r3,#9
;;;565            uint32_t vm_start = current_sector;
;;;566            uint32_t vm_end = current_sector + vm_sectors;
00002a  18c3              ADDS     r3,r0,r3
;;;567    
;;;568            // Data can be used in this sector
;;;569            if ((requested_sector >= vm_start) && (requested_sector < vm_end)) {
00002c  9300              STR      r3,[sp,#0]
00002e  4284              CMP      r4,r0
000030  d30c              BCC      |L23.76|
000032  429c              CMP      r4,r3
000034  d20a              BCS      |L23.76|
;;;570                uint32_t sector_offset;
;;;571                uint32_t sectors_to_write = vm_end - requested_sector;
000036  1b1f              SUBS     r7,r3,r4
;;;572                sectors_to_write = MIN(sectors_to_write, num_sectors);
000038  42af              CMP      r7,r5
00003a  d300              BCC      |L23.62|
00003c  462f              MOV      r7,r5
                  |L23.62|
;;;573                sector_offset = requested_sector - current_sector;
;;;574                virtual_media[i].read_cb(sector_offset, buf, sectors_to_write);
00003e  5853              LDR      r3,[r2,r1]
000040  1a20              SUBS     r0,r4,r0              ;573
000042  463a              MOV      r2,r7
000044  9903              LDR      r1,[sp,#0xc]
000046  4798              BLX      r3
;;;575                // Update requested sector
;;;576                requested_sector += sectors_to_write;
000048  19e4              ADDS     r4,r4,r7
;;;577                num_sectors -= sectors_to_write;
00004a  1bed              SUBS     r5,r5,r7
                  |L23.76|
;;;578            }
;;;579    
;;;580            // If there is no more data to be read then break
;;;581            if (num_sectors == 0) {
00004c  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
00004e  d006              BEQ      |L23.94|
000050  4904              LDR      r1,|L23.100|
000052  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1
000054  6889              LDR      r1,[r1,#8]            ;563  ; virtual_media_idx
000056  b2f6              UXTB     r6,r6                 ;563
000058  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;563
00005a  428e              CMP      r6,r1                 ;563
00005c  d3de              BCC      |L23.28|
                  |L23.94|
;;;582                break;
;;;583            }
;;;584    
;;;585            // Move to the next virtual media entry
;;;586            current_sector += vm_sectors;
;;;587        }
;;;588    }
00005e  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000060  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;589    
                          ENDP

000062  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L23.100|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L23.104|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x600

                          AREA ||i.vfs_set_file_change_callback||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  vfs_set_file_change_callback PROC
;;;549    
;;;550    void vfs_set_file_change_callback(vfs_file_change_cb_t cb)
000000  4901              LDR      r1,|L24.8|
;;;551    {
;;;552        file_change_cb = cb;
000002  6048              STR      r0,[r1,#4]  ; file_change_cb
;;;553    }
000004  4770              BX       lr
;;;554    
                          ENDP

000006  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L24.8|
                          DCD      ||.data||

                          AREA ||i.vfs_strncmp||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  vfs_strncmp PROC
;;;1067   
;;;1068   static int vfs_strncmp(const void * a, const void * b)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1069   {
;;;1070       return strncmp((const char *)a, (const char *)b, 11);
000002  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb
000004  f7fffffe          BL       strncmp
;;;1071   }
000008  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.vfs_write||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  vfs_write PROC
;;;631    
;;;632    void vfs_write(uint32_t requested_sector, const uint8_t *buf, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b5f7              PUSH     {r0-r2,r4-r7,lr}
;;;633    {
;;;634        uint8_t i = 0;
;;;635        uint32_t current_sector;
;;;636        current_sector = 0;
;;;637    
;;;638        for (i = 0; i < virtual_media_idx; i++) {
000002  4916              LDR      r1,|L26.92|
000004  4615              MOV      r5,r2                 ;633
000006  2600              MOVS     r6,#0                 ;634
000008  688a              LDR      r2,[r1,#8]  ; virtual_media_idx
00000a  4604              MOV      r4,r0                 ;633
00000c  b082              SUB      sp,sp,#8              ;633
00000e  4630              MOV      r0,r6                 ;636
000010  2a00              CMP      r2,#0
000012  d920              BLS      |L26.86|
                  |L26.20|
;;;639            uint32_t vm_sectors = virtual_media[i].length / VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
000014  210c              MOVS     r1,#0xc
000016  4632              MOV      r2,r6
000018  434a              MULS     r2,r1,r2
00001a  4911              LDR      r1,|L26.96|
00001c  1852              ADDS     r2,r2,r1
00001e  6891              LDR      r1,[r2,#8]
000020  0a49              LSRS     r1,r1,#9
;;;640            uint32_t vm_start = current_sector;
;;;641            uint32_t vm_end = current_sector + vm_sectors;
000022  1841              ADDS     r1,r0,r1
;;;642    
;;;643            // Data can be used in this sector
;;;644            if ((requested_sector >= vm_start) && (requested_sector < vm_end)) {
000024  9100              STR      r1,[sp,#0]
000026  4284              CMP      r4,r0
000028  d30c              BCC      |L26.68|
00002a  428c              CMP      r4,r1
00002c  d20a              BCS      |L26.68|
;;;645                uint32_t sector_offset;
;;;646                uint32_t sectors_to_read = vm_end - requested_sector;
00002e  1b0f              SUBS     r7,r1,r4
;;;647                sectors_to_read = MIN(sectors_to_read, num_sectors);
000030  42af              CMP      r7,r5
000032  d300              BCC      |L26.54|
000034  462f              MOV      r7,r5
                  |L26.54|
;;;648                sector_offset = requested_sector - current_sector;
;;;649                virtual_media[i].write_cb(sector_offset, buf, sectors_to_read);
000036  6853              LDR      r3,[r2,#4]
000038  1a20              SUBS     r0,r4,r0              ;648
00003a  463a              MOV      r2,r7
00003c  9903              LDR      r1,[sp,#0xc]
00003e  4798              BLX      r3
;;;650                // Update requested sector
;;;651                requested_sector += sectors_to_read;
000040  19e4              ADDS     r4,r4,r7
;;;652                num_sectors -= sectors_to_read;
000042  1bed              SUBS     r5,r5,r7
                  |L26.68|
;;;653            }
;;;654    
;;;655            // If there is no more data to be read then break
;;;656            if (num_sectors == 0) {
000044  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
000046  d006              BEQ      |L26.86|
000048  4904              LDR      r1,|L26.92|
00004a  1c76              ADDS     r6,r6,#1
00004c  6889              LDR      r1,[r1,#8]            ;638  ; virtual_media_idx
00004e  b2f6              UXTB     r6,r6                 ;638
000050  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;638
000052  428e              CMP      r6,r1                 ;638
000054  d3de              BCC      |L26.20|
                  |L26.86|
;;;657                break;
;;;658            }
;;;659    
;;;660            // Move to the next virtual media entry
;;;661            current_sector += vm_sectors;
;;;662        }
;;;663    }
000056  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000058  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;664    
                          ENDP

00005a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L26.92|
                          DCD      ||.data||
                  |L26.96|
                          DCD      ||.bss||+0x600

                          AREA ||i.write_dir||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  write_dir PROC
;;;948    
;;;949    static void write_dir(uint32_t sector_offset, const uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b5f7              PUSH     {r0-r2,r4-r7,lr}
;;;950    {
;;;951        FatDirectoryEntry_t *old_entry;
;;;952        FatDirectoryEntry_t *new_entry;
;;;953        uint32_t start_index;
;;;954        uint32_t num_entries;
;;;955        uint32_t i;
;;;956    
;;;957        if ((sector_offset + num_sectors) * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE > sizeof(dir_current)) {
000002  1881              ADDS     r1,r0,r2
000004  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
000006  0249              LSLS     r1,r1,#9
000008  029b              LSLS     r3,r3,#10
00000a  b088              SUB      sp,sp,#0x20           ;950
00000c  4299              CMP      r1,r3
00000e  d906              BLS      |L27.30|
;;;958            // Trying to write too much of the root directory
;;;959            util_assert(0);
000010  4a31              LDR      r2,|L27.216|
000012  a132              ADR      r1,|L27.220|
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000016  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
;;;960            return;
;;;961        }
;;;962    
;;;963        start_index = sector_offset * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE / sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t);
;;;964        num_entries = num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE / sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t);
;;;965        old_entry = &dir_current.f[start_index];
;;;966        new_entry = (FatDirectoryEntry_t *)data;
;;;967        // If this is the first sector start at index 1 to get past drive name
;;;968        i = 0 == sector_offset ? 1 : 0;
;;;969    
;;;970        for (; i < num_entries; i++) {
;;;971            bool same_name;
;;;972    
;;;973            if (0 == memcmp(&old_entry[i], &new_entry[i], sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t))) {
;;;974                continue;
;;;975            }
;;;976    
;;;977            // If were at this point then something has changed in the file
;;;978            same_name = (0 == memcmp(old_entry[i].filename, new_entry[i].filename, sizeof(new_entry[i].filename))) ? 1 : 0;
;;;979            // Changed
;;;980            file_change_cb(new_entry[i].filename, VFS_FILE_CHANGED, (vfs_file_t)&old_entry[i], (vfs_file_t)&new_entry[i]);
;;;981    
;;;982            // Deleted
;;;983            if (0xe5 == (uint8_t)new_entry[i].filename[0]) {
;;;984                file_change_cb(old_entry[i].filename, VFS_FILE_DELETED, (vfs_file_t)&old_entry[i], (vfs_file_t)&new_entry[i]);
;;;985                continue;
;;;986            }
;;;987    
;;;988            // Created
;;;989            if (!same_name && filename_valid(new_entry[i].filename)) {
;;;990                file_change_cb(new_entry[i].filename, VFS_FILE_CREATED, (vfs_file_t)&old_entry[i], (vfs_file_t)&new_entry[i]);
;;;991                continue;
;;;992            }
;;;993        }
;;;994    
;;;995        memcpy(&dir_current.f[start_index], data, num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE);
;;;996    }
00001a  b00b              ADD      sp,sp,#0x2c
00001c  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L27.30|
00001e  0241              LSLS     r1,r0,#9              ;963
000020  094b              LSRS     r3,r1,#5              ;963
000022  0251              LSLS     r1,r2,#9              ;964
000024  9104              STR      r1,[sp,#0x10]         ;964
000026  0949              LSRS     r1,r1,#5              ;964
000028  9106              STR      r1,[sp,#0x18]         ;965
00002a  4939              LDR      r1,|L27.272|
00002c  015a              LSLS     r2,r3,#5              ;965
00002e  1851              ADDS     r1,r2,r1              ;965
000030  9102              STR      r1,[sp,#8]            ;965
000032  9103              STR      r1,[sp,#0xc]          ;966
000034  9909              LDR      r1,[sp,#0x24]         ;966
000036  9101              STR      r1,[sp,#4]            ;968
000038  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;968
00003a  d029              BEQ      |L27.144|
00003c  2600              MOVS     r6,#0                 ;968
                  |L27.62|
00003e  9806              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x18]         ;970

00004a  1844              ADDS     r4,r0,r1              ;973

                  |L27.148|

0000a4  47a0              BLX      r4                    ;984
0000a6  e00b              B        |L27.192|
                  |L27.168|

0000b6  462a              MOV      r2,r5                 ;990

                  |L27.200|

0000d2  b00b              ADD      sp,sp,#0x2c
0000d4  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;997

                          AREA ||i.write_fat_internal||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  write_fat_internal PROC
;;;271    
;;;272    static void write_fat_internal(file_allocation_table_t *fat, uint32_t idx, uint16_t val)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;273    {
;;;274        uint32_t low_idx;
;;;275        uint32_t high_idx;
;;;276        low_idx = idx * 2 + 0;
000002  004b              LSLS     r3,r1,#1
;;;277        high_idx = idx * 2 + 1;
;;;278    
;;;279        // Assert that this is still within the fat table
;;;280        if (high_idx >= ELEMENTS_IN_ARRAY(fat->f)) {
000004  2401              MOVS     r4,#1
000006  1c59              ADDS     r1,r3,#1              ;277
000008  0264              LSLS     r4,r4,#9
00000a  42a1              CMP      r1,r4
00000c  d306              BCC      |L28.28|
;;;281            util_assert(0);
00000e  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000010  321a              ADDS     r2,r2,#0x1a
000012  4904              LDR      r1,|L28.36|
000014  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000016  f7fffffe          BL       _util_assert
;;;282            return;
;;;283        }
;;;284    
;;;285        fat->f[low_idx] = (val >> 0) & 0xFF;
;;;286        fat->f[high_idx] = (val >> 8) & 0xFF;
;;;287    }
00001a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L28.28|
00001c  54c2              STRB     r2,[r0,r3]            ;285
00001e  0a12              LSRS     r2,r2,#8              ;286
000020  5442              STRB     r2,[r0,r1]            ;286
000022  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;288    
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.write_flash_dir||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  write_flash_dir PROC
;;;714    
;;;715    void write_flash_dir(uint32_t sector_offset, const uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)
000000  b5f7              PUSH     {r0-r2,r4-r7,lr}
;;;716    {
;;;717        FatDirectoryEntry_t old_entry;
;;;718        FatDirectoryEntry_t new_entry;
;;;719    
;;;720        uint32_t byte_offset = sector_offset * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
000002  0240              LSLS     r0,r0,#9
000004  b092              SUB      sp,sp,#0x48           ;716
;;;721        uint32_t num_bytes = num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE;
000006  0257              LSLS     r7,r2,#9
;;;722        uint32_t idx = 0u;
000008  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;723    
;;;724        for (idx = 0u; idx < num_bytes; idx += sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t))
00000a  9010              STR      r0,[sp,#0x40]
00000c  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
00000e  d91e              BLS      |L29.78|
                  |L29.16|
;;;725        {
;;;726            vfs_nvm_read_DIR((uint8_t*)(&old_entry), byte_offset + idx, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
000010  9810              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x40]
000012  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
000014  1906              ADDS     r6,r0,r4
000016  4631              MOV      r1,r6
000018  a808              ADD      r0,sp,#0x20
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_read_DIR
;;;727    
;;;728            if (memcmp(&old_entry, &data[idx], sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t)) != 0u)
00001e  9813              LDR      r0,[sp,#0x4c]
000020  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
000022  1905              ADDS     r5,r0,r4
000024  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000026  a808              ADD      r0,sp,#0x20
000028  f7fffffe          BL       memcmp
00002c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00002e  d00b              BEQ      |L29.72|
;;;729            {
;;;730                if (vfs_strncmp(&data[idx], "SELECTR HEX") == 0u)
000030  a10e              ADR      r1,|L29.108|
000032  220b              MOVS     r2,#0xb
000034  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000036  f7fffffe          BL       strncmp
00003a  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00003c  d009              BEQ      |L29.82|
;;;731                {
;;;732                    memcpy(&new_entry, &data[idx], sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
;;;733                    new_entry.attributes = VFS_FILE_ATTR_READ_ONLY
;;;734                                         | VFS_FILE_ATTR_HIDDEN
;;;735                                         | VFS_FILE_ATTR_SYSTEM
;;;736                                         | VFS_FILE_ATTR_ARCHIVE;
;;;737    
;;;738                    vfs_nvm_write_DIR((uint8_t*)(&new_entry), byte_offset + idx, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
;;;739                }
;;;740                else
;;;741                {
;;;742                    vfs_nvm_write_DIR(&data[idx], byte_offset + idx, sizeof(FatDirectoryEntry_t));
00003e  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20
000040  4631              MOV      r1,r6
000042  4628              MOV      r0,r5
                  |L29.68|
000044  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_write_DIR
                  |L29.72|
000048  3420              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x20           ;738
00004a  42bc              CMP      r4,r7                 ;724
00004c  d3e0              BCC      |L29.16|
                  |L29.78|
;;;743                }
;;;744            }
;;;745            else
;;;746            {
;;;747                /* */
;;;748            }
;;;749        }
;;;750    }
00004e  b015              ADD      sp,sp,#0x54
000050  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
                  |L29.82|
000052  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20              ;732
000054  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;732
000056  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;732
000058  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
00005c  2027              MOVS     r0,#0x27              ;733
00005e  4669              MOV      r1,sp                 ;733
000060  72c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#0xb]          ;733
000062  2220              MOVS     r2,#0x20              ;738
000064  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;738
000066  4668              MOV      r0,sp                 ;738
000068  e7ec              B        |L29.68|
;;;751    
                          ENDP

                  |L29.108|

                  write_flash_fat PROC
;;;924    
;;;925    static void write_flash_fat(uint32_t sector_offset, const uint8_t *data, uint32_t num_sectors)

;;;927        vfs_nvm_write_FAT(data, (sector_offset * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE), (num_sectors * VFS_SECTOR_SIZE));

                  write_flash_file PROC

000000  460b              MOV      r3,r1
;;;763    {

000004  0241              LSLS     r1,r0,#9

;;;766

00000a  f7fffffe          BL       vfs_nvm_write_FILE
;;;768    }
00000e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;769    
                          ENDP

                  write_none PROC

;;;870    {
;;;871        // Do nothing
;;;872    }
;;;873    
                          ENDP

                  mbr

                  mbr_tmpl
000000  eb3c904d          DCB      0xeb,0x3c,0x90,0x4d

                          DCD      0x00000000
                          DCD      0x00000000
000024  000029            DCB      0x00,0x00,0x29
                          DCDU     0x27021974
